description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in AssoCIateD (aka ACID) CMS 1.1.3 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the root_path parameter to (1) menu.php, (2) profile.php, (3) users.php, (4) cache_mngt.php, and (5) gallery_functions.php.
